title: Buttery Clam Pasta
description: A rich and savory pasta dish featuring succulent clams in a garlicky butter sauce.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the buttery pasta according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the mediterranean olive oil over medium heat. Add the minced garlic and sauté for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the juicy clams to the skillet and sauté for 2-3 minutes until they start to open.
Add the cooked pasta to the skillet, tossing to combine with the clam and garlic mixture.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the pasta hot, topped with crumble breadcrumbs if desired.
